title: Nutty Juicy Slovenian Pecan Stir-fry
description: This vermicelli rice noodle dish features a savory mix of pecans and other nuts for a show-off Slovakian twist. It's sugar-free-friendly and can be enjoyed as a meal.

ingredients.name: 1 cup vermicelli rice noodles
ingredients.notes: soaked in warm water for at least 30 minutes

ingredients.name: 8 oz ground beef or turkey sausage

instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add ground meat and sauté until browned.
Add scallions, garlic, pecans, and honey (if using). Stir-fry for about 2 minutes.
Pour in soy sauce and lemon juice, stirring well to combine all ingredients. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until sauce thickens slightly.
Gradually add soaked vermicelli noodles, tossing continuously until noodles are fully coated with the sauce and heated through.
